message:
🐛 fix distribution filter and kubescape modal cluster switching (#9531, #9541) (#9553)

- Add distribution/provider filter to global filter system: state management
  in useGlobalFilters, filter logic in useClusterFiltering, and filter UI
  in ClusterFilterPanel (#9541)
- Add cluster switching dropdown to KubescapeDetailModal so users can
  navigate between clusters without closing the modal (#9531)

Closes #9531
Closes #9541

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

   const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams()
   const location = useLocation()
   const navigate = useNavigate()
